title: Poor delivery
text: The order arrived very late and the food was completely cold when it finally came

title: App crashes often
text: Every time I try to pay the application crashes and I lose my cart items completely

title: Great experience
text: Fast delivery and excellent customer support when my order had missing items resolved quickly

title: Bad support
text: Customer care never responds to complaints about wrong orders and refunds take weeks

title: Okay app
text: Works fine most of the time but search filters could be improved for better restaurant discovery

title: Good offers
text: Coupon codes work well and prices are reasonable compared to other food delivery apps

title: Login issues
text: Cannot login with phone number OTP fails repeatedly and password reset does not work either

title: Payment failed
text: Payment deducted twice from my card but order was never placed support is unhelpful
